title: Fresh Look: Better Chests
description: The resourcepack improves the look of chests
body:
![FL Chests Modrinth Page 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36f8c3884d307b5a1bdfd5bd7f04ec9513257eeb_0.webp)

# Fresh Look: Chests
Fresh Look: Chests updates the appearance of all wooden chests

The resource pack improves (as of the version 1.2.0):
- **Chest**
- **Trapped Chest**
- **Boats with Chest** (Oak, Spruce, Birch, Jungle, Acacia, Dark Oak, Mangrove, Cherry, Pale Oak)
- **Bamboo Raft with Chest**
- **Minecart with Chest**
- **Donkey and Mule chests**
- **Llama chest**
